header.name: Return By Death - Resource Pack
header.description: Resource pack for Return By Death v1.2.5. v1.2.5 HOTFIX: rolled back risky sound_definitions.json values that caused v1.2.4 to break. The OGG file is still the boosted -14dB version from v1.2.4 (6x louder than original). The sound is in the resource pack because Bedrock only loads custom sounds from resource packs, NOT behavior packs.
